ew_context: Price forming potential wave B completion or wave 4 exhaustion at double top resistance - corrective structure favoring downside
pattern_desc: Double top pattern with peaks at 9.1493 and 9.1473, showing clear rejection at resistance. Current breakdown below neckline support confirms bearish reversal.
invalidation: Close above 9.1056 neckline resistance on M15 timeframe negates the pattern
market_context: Crypto market showing weakness with BTC trading flat and broader risk-off sentiment. AVAX oversold RSI at 35.8% suggests momentum exhaustion after recent decline
